field.label: Enable
field.help: Run netflector. The daemon needs at least one enabled reflector below, so the service stays stopped until you add one.

field.label: Log level
field.help: Verbosity of the daemon's log. "Debug" and "Trace" are noisy and are meant for diagnosing a problem, not for running.

field.label: Counter interval
field.help: Seconds between per-interface packet-counter summaries in the log. 0 disables them.
